---
pagetitle: "NBA RAPTOR Player Ratings | Above .500"
---

```{python}
#| output: asis
from above500 import nba_raptor, render
from html import escape

f = nba_raptor.forecast()

print(f'<span class="kicker">{escape(f["league"])}</span>')
print(f'<h1 class="headline">{escape(f["name"])}</h1>')
print(f'<p class="dek">{escape(f["description"])}</p>')
print(render.byline(f))
```

```{python}
#| output: asis
print(render.odds_table(
    f["leaderboard"],
    columns=[
        {"key": "name", "kind": "team", "label": "Player"},
        {"key": "mp", "kind": "num", "label": "Minutes", "hide_sm": True},
        {"key": "off", "kind": "dec", "label": "Off.", "hide_sm": True},
        {"key": "dfn", "kind": "dec", "label": "Def.", "hide_sm": True},
        {"key": "raptor", "kind": "dec", "label": "RAPTOR"},
        {"key": "history", "kind": "spark", "label": "Career", "hide_sm": True},
        {"key": "war", "kind": "dec", "label": "WAR"},
    ],
    title=f'Top players, {f["season_label"]}',
    note="Best by wins above replacement",
    sort_key="war",
))
```

```{python}
#| output: asis
print(render.odds_table(
    f["projections"],
    columns=[
        {"key": "name", "kind": "team", "label": "Player"},
        {"key": "history", "kind": "spark", "label": "Career", "hide_sm": True},
        {"key": "last", "kind": "dec", "label": f["season_label"]},
        {"key": "proj", "kind": "dec", "label": "Projection"},
    ],
    title=f'Projected {f["proj_label"]} RAPTOR',
    note="Model's one-season-ahead forecast",
    sort_key="proj",
))
```

```{python}
#| output: asis
print('<details class="model-performance">')
print('<summary>Model performance &amp; backtest</summary>')
print(render.regression_backtest_table(f["backtest"]))
print(render.projection_tiers_table(f["backtest"]))
print(render.regression_eras_table(f["backtest"]))
print('</details>')
print(render.methodology_box(f))
```
